description_long: This is a white, soft plastic tube of lotion with a rounded base and a tapered top, capped with a screw-on lid. The front of the tube features Japanese text in black and orange, along with several circular graphic elements in orange and yellow, and the brand name 'SANA' at the bottom. The back of the tube is densely covered with additional Japanese text, likely instructions and product information, printed in gray. The sides of the tube show a barcode and more text, with the graphics wrapping partially around the body. The tube appears semi-glossy, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface typical of personal care packaging. The overall form is ergonomic, designed to be easily squeezed to dispense the lotion inside.
description: A white, soft plastic squeeze tube of lotion with Japanese text, orange and yellow graphics, and a screw-on cap. The surface is smooth and semi-glossy, with branding and product details visible.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tube's tapered profile, barcode, and partial graphics.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main Japanese text, orange and yellow circular graphics, and the SANA brand logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more text and graphics, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Back view covered with dense Japanese text, likely instructions and product details.
